chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-83 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on MA 5593/25 2.For orders on MA 5594/25 3.For hearing of main case 04-12-2025 None present for the appellant. **** None present for the appellant; no intimation is received. Record reflects that since inception, when this matter came up for hearing on 13.10.2025, none was present on behalf of the appellant. Even on 20.11.2025, none was present on behalf of the appellant and the matter was adjourned for 27.11.2025 with intimation notice to counsel for the appellant. On 27.11.2025, again brief was held on behalf of the appellant’s counsel and, as a last chance, the matter was adjourned for today. Today, position is same; none is in attendance on behalf of appellant, which reflects that the appellant and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
